overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic urban downtown. The player walks under elevated highways, crosses streets with futuristic traffic, and approaches a distinctive building with an illuminated golden hexagonal facade.

events.description: approaching crosswalk with futuristic vehicles passing on the left
stepping onto the crosswalk to begin crossing the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the overpass toward the crosswalk, navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in purple jacket walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: large concrete highway structure overhead with integrated strip lighting
tall building with distinctive illuminated golden hexagonal facade pattern
sidewalk with yellow tactile paving strips for the visually impaired
futuristic city street with multiple lanes of moving traffic

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking under a massive elevated highway overpass. The distinctive golden hexagonal building is visible in the distance on the right, while futuristic vehicles pass by on the multi-lane street to the left. The player walks along the concrete sidewalk, passing a pedestrian in a purple jacket, and approaches a crosswalk.

events.description: entering the crosswalk from the covered sidewalk into the open intersection
yellow futuristic sedan passes by on the right side
turning left to walk parallel to the street traffic under the overpass

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and then walking along the road under the overpass, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: yellow futuristic sedan driving past the crosswalk from right to left

entered.detail: zebra crossing with yellow stripes painted on the asphalt
thick concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway structure

segments.scene_description: The player steps onto the crosswalk, transitioning from the sheltered sidewalk to the open intersection. A yellow futuristic vehicle passes by on the right as the player crosses. After crossing, the player turns left to walk along the street, passing under the overpass support pillars while the golden hexagonal building remains visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway with neon advertising installation

events.description: entering the neon-lit advertising corridor under the overpass
ambient lighting shifts to predominantly pink, blue, and yellow neon colors from the strip lights

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered walkway passing colorful neon lights and illuminated advertisements on the left wall

entered.detail: curved wall with large illuminated advertisements and futuristic posters
horizontal neon light strips in pink, blue, and yellow running along the base of the wall

segments.scene_description: The player walks into a narrow enclosed walkway under the overpass, passing a vibrant neon installation on the left featuring colorful light strips and advertising posters. The lighting shifts to a mix of pink, blue, and yellow neon hues. The golden hexagonal building draws closer on the right as the player moves through this corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza area with iconic illuminated building facade

events.description: emerging from under overpass into open plaza with the golden hexagonal building dominating the view
slowing pace and tilting camera upward to admire the building facade

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the golden building facade, looking up at the illuminated hexagonal patterns and pink neon structures

entered.detail: external staircase with bright pink neon lighting attached to the golden building facade
silhouetted palm trees standing in front of the illuminated golden facade
low concrete seating platforms arranged along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the overpass into an open plaza dominated by the massive golden hexagonal building. The camera pans up to reveal the intricate illuminated facade with its honeycomb pattern and a striking pink neon staircase structure. Palm trees and concrete benches line the walkway as the player slowly explores the area, admiring the architectural details.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the shadowed depths of an urban overpass toward the brilliant glow of a futuristic architectural landmark. It begins by walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive highway overpass, passing a pedestrian in a purple jacket while a golden hexagonal building looms in the distance. As the camera steps onto a crosswalk and navigates through traffic, the scene shifts into a narrow enclosed walkway where the lighting transforms into a vibrant mix of pink, blue, and yellow neon hues. The camera then moves through this colorful corridor before emerging from the shelter of the overpass into a wide-open plaza. Finally, the view pans upward to reveal the full scale of the illuminated honeycomb facade and a striking pink neon staircase, surrounded by palm trees and concrete benches.
